data.title: This Week in Bitcoin: Bybit Hack Rocks Market as ETFs Bleed—But Institutions Remain Bullish
data.description:
Bitcoin's price stayed below $100K this week amid inflation fears and the broader effects of the Bybit hack, while ETFs showed only red.
source: https://decrypt.co/307119/this-week-bitcoin-bybit-hack-etfs-bleed-institutions-bullish

data.title: Kanye West's X account followed CZ
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News X platform shows that Kanye West's X account follows CZ, and CZ is the only one he follows. The community speculates that Kanye may issue his Meme coin on BNB Chain.

data.title: Altseason On The Way? Key DeFi Developments Signal Major Crypto Surge
data.description:
In every market cycle, the altseason is an anticipated period for investors marked by a general altcoins’ price outperformance against Bitcoin. However, there have been many doubts over an altseason in the current bull run with crypto analysts citing a surge in the number of altcoins over the last four years. Interestingly, Bitwise Chief Investment Officer (CIO) Matt Hougan has backed the...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/altseason-on-the-way-key-defi-developments-signal-major-crypto-surge/

data.title: CZ: This is my first time using DEX, and the experience can be improved a lot
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CZ posted on X platform: "This is my first time using AMM, liquidity pool, etc. You don't have to be surprised, I have never used DEX before, I use CEX. I want to put some BNB in ​​TST LP as a test, and I have seen the demo of Pancake before. It looks simple. So I didn't refer to any video tutorials. I wanted to see what the first experience would be like. As a novice, I have to say that the DEX experience can be improved a lot, and the wrong signature doesn't make any sense. There may be robots trying to run my public address (or any large transaction) first, why everyone can watch what I am doing in real time, well, there is still a lot to do."

data.title: BNB Surpasses 670 USDT with a 4.55% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 22, 2025, 17:51 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 670 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 675.72998 USDT, with a narrowed 4.55% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Security execs weigh in on ‘staggering’ scale of record Bybit hack
data.description:
The record-breaking $1.4 billion Bybit hack displays the “increasingly creative exploits” seen in the crypto industry, Halborn’s co-founder told Cointelegraph.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bybit-hack-security-execs-weigh-in?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance’s CZ buys 1 BNB of $TST, now working on adding it to liquidity pool
data.description:
Changpeng CZ Zhao just bought 1 BNB worth of $TST (approximately 5,400), and now he’s figuring out how to add it to a liquidity pool (LP). The former Binance CEO admitted via a post on X that the process wasn’t as easy as expected, even for someone who built the world’s largest crypto exchange. “DEX […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/binance-cz-buys-tst-adding-to-liquidity-pool/

data.title: Bybit launches $140 million recovery bounty program for stolen $1.5 billion
data.description:
Bybit is putting $140 million on the table for anyone who can help recover the $1.5 billion in stolen crypto from the biggest hack in history. The exchange, which is the second-largest by trading volume, announced that it will reward 10% of any funds recovered to cybersecurity experts, blockchain analysts, and ethical hackers who can […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bybit-launches-140-million-recovery-bounty/
